name: Zhejiang Jihua Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Jihua Group Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates in the dyestuff industry. The company produces and sells disperse, reactive, acid, direct, and vulcanizing dyes. It also provides dyestuff intermediates, H acid, synthetic-anthraquinone products, macromolecular materials, and polyurethane foams. In addition, the company offers organic silicon temperature resistant coating, fluorine-containing coating, and other products; sulfuric acid; and thermoelectric and other fundamental raw materials, as well as products for auxiliary, pharmaceutical, and financial industries. It also exports its products. The company is based in Hangzhou, China.
